title: eclipta prostrata
intro: Eclipta prostrata, also known as Eclipta alba or False Daisy, is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin conditions, promote hair growth, and support liver health. The health benefits of Eclipta prostrata include reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and protecting against oxidative damage. Eclipta prostrata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
